rules.rule: every prompt MUST be bound to a grounding_id, canonical_product_id, and synthesis_id.
every prompt revision is append-only and carries prior_prompt_id; in-place edits are FORBIDDEN.
prompt provenance MUST record reviewer, created_at_iso, intent, and constraints.
prompt content is reviewer-authored text; autonomous LLM-driven prompt synthesis is FORBIDDEN.
publication lineage MUST trace every published image back to a prompt_revision_id (or source_provenance for non-generated assets).
prompt deletion is FORBIDDEN; deprecation requires reviewer attribution and lineage preservation.
